switch.title: Clear external storage cache
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_clear_disk=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_clear_disk=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_clear_disk=0/clearbox_clear_disk=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » It's turned on!" else sed -i 's/clearbox_clear_disk=1/clearbox_clear_disk=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » Closed!" fi

switch.title: External Storage File Classification
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_file_all_disk=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_file_all_disk=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_file_all_disk=0/clearbox_file_all_disk=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » It's turned on!" else sed -i 's/clearbox_file_all_disk=1/clearbox_file_all_disk=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » Closed!" fi

switch.title: External Storage File Cleanup
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_file_clear_disk=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_file_clear_disk=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_file_clear_disk=0/clearbox_file_clear_disk=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » It's turned on!" else sed -i 's/clearbox_file_clear_disk=1/clearbox_file_clear_disk=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » Closed!" fi
